Package index

All functions

contains_vignette_folder()
Check for Vignette Folder and .Rmd Files in a .tar File
create_coverage_skip_stf()
Run covr with failing tests
extract_short_path()
Helper to extract "R/<file>" from any path by taking the last two components
generate_test_report()
Generate HTML Report for Package Test Assessment
get_package_coverage()
get test package coverage
get_pkg_name()
get package name for display
install_package_local()
Install package locally
map_test()
Map the hierarchy structure of a testthat test file
map_tests_stf()
Map the hierarchy structure of tests directory in standard testing framework
run_coverage()
Run covr and potentially save results to disk
run_covr_modes()
Run Coverage Analysis with Test Detection
run_covr_skip_bioc_nstf()
Run coverage with skip detection for Bioconductor RUnit-based packages
run_covr_skip_nstf()
Run Coverage Analysis on Package Source and Tests
run_covr_skip_stf()
Run covr with failing tests #' This function runs test coverage and skip analysis for a package using testthat or other supported frameworks.
set_up_pkg()
Creates information on package installation
